note: Carded AFTER the fix, straight to done, as a register. User asked custom-node zips be downloaded uncompressed to skip extraction; measured that the real cost is extract-zip's JS write loop (file-count-bound), not compression. Fixed via native tar with extract-zip fallback.

perf(downloads) shipped in routes/downloadManager.js _extractZipArchive: native tar -xf first, extract-zip fallback. Win 1299->476ms (2.7x). RAM-safer (streaming, separate process). Pod path never runs this; macOS bsdtar reads zip; Linux GNU-tar falls back. Byte-identical layout verified. NOT committed (shared tree).

summary: Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-248/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
